```python
import requests

# Try to fetch Video-MME GitHub page directly
urls_to_try = [
    "https://github.com/BradyFU/Video-MME",
    "https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.21075",  # Video-MME arXiv
]

for url in urls_to_try:
    print(f"\n=== Trying {url} ===")
    response = requests.post(
        "http://localhost:50103/web/fetch",
        json={"url": url, "timeout_seconds": 30}
    )
    print(f"Status: {response.status_code}")
    if response.status_code == 200:
        content = response.text
        print(f"Content length: {len(content)}")
        # Look for author information
        if "author" in content.lower() or "作者" in content:
            print("Found author info!")
            print(content[:2000])
            break
    else:
        print(response.text[:500])
```
